name: Custom Cuts
description: Video overlay extension providing accessibility features: subtitles, tagging, time-range skipping, and hotkey controls

queue-skip-next.description: Skip to next video in queue

queue-remove-current.description: Remove currently playing video from queue

close-tab.description: Close current tab (unbound by default — set at chrome://extensions/shortcuts)

fast-forward-large.description: Fast forward video (large skip) (unbound by default — set at chrome://extensions/shortcuts)

rate-p1-one-star.description: Rate current video: P1 = 1 star (unbound by default — set at chrome://extensions/shortcuts)

rate-p1-five-stars.description: Rate current video: P1 = 5 stars (unbound by default — set at chrome://extensions/shortcuts)

quicktag-review.description: Add REVIEW quicktag to current video (unbound by default — set at chrome://extensions/shortcuts)
